review_text: Battery drains in just 2 hours. Very disappointing for this price range.
Excellent camera quality! Photos come out sharp even in low light.
The packaging was terrible — box was crushed and phone had scratches.
Fast delivery, received within 2 days. Very happy with the service.
Display is amazing, AMOLED screen with vibrant colors. Love it!
Battery life is terrible. Doesn't even last half a day with normal use.

Yeah right, 'great' battery life — dead by lunchtime every day.
Sound quality is good for the price. Bass could be better though.
Packaging was damaged again! Second time ordering and same issue.
Good build quality, feels premium. The metal body is sturdy.
Customer service is the worst. Waited 3 weeks for a response.
Delivery was delayed by 10 days. Very frustrating experience.
Camera is not bad, but not great either. Average for this price.
